note.summary: With only 41 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, normal BB state, bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD, and range-bottom show confirmed positive EV (WR 0.70-0.91, n>=8-24) while UP signals and most other buckets remain unprofitable or too small. Overall pnl modest positive but driven by few high-conviction DOWN cohorts; many buckets ignored due to n<8. No material change possible without prior_analysis.
warnings: Total n=41 too small for robust conclusions; many buckets n<8 ignored
Positive EV after cost but realized pnl fragile and regime-dependent
observe_only mode means no live validation yet
focus_next: Accumulate more DOWN_STRONG + bearish_aligned + sell_pressure samples
Monitor if normal_bb and range_bottom edges persist above breakeven

history.summary: With only 34 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals (n=23, WR 0.739) in trending regimes, strong ADX, bearish MTF alignment, CVD sell pressure, BB normal state, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV and WR above breakeven after costs; UP signals and most other buckets remain unprofitable or too small. Strength >=0.8 and z-score -1..1 also look viable while many regime slices are still n<8 noise. No material change possible as this is first observation.

With 34 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, bearish MTF alignment, CVD sell pressure, BB normal state, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV (win rates 0.65-0.90, n>=10-26). UP signals, vwap above, and expansion BB states remain unprofitable or noisy. Sample size limits confirmation outside these buckets.
changes_since_last: First analysis - no prior comparison available

history.summary: With only 34 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals (n=23, WR 0.739) in trending regimes, sell_pressure CVD, bearish_aligned MTF, normal BB state, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV and WR above breakeven after costs; UP signals and most other buckets remain unprofitable or too small. Overall book is near breakeven due to the small UP sample dragging performance. No material change possible without prior analysis; sample still too limited for broad conclusions.
changes_since_last: No prior analysis provided; first observation

history.summary: With only 34 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals (n=23, WR 0.739) in trending/strong-ADX regimes, sell-pressure CVD, bearish MTF alignment, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV and WR above breakeven after costs; UP signals and most other buckets remain unprofitable or too small. Normal BB state and vwap-below also look promising but overlap heavily with the DOWN bias. All other dimensions are noise given n<8 or inconsistent results.
changes_since_last: no prior analysis provided; this is baseline

history.summary: DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes with sell_pressure CVD, bearish MTF alignment, normal BB state, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV (n=10-23, WR 0.72-0.91 above breakeven after costs). UP direction and most expansion/squeeze or low-n buckets remain unprofitable or unreliable. Overall sample of 34 is still small with slight net negative PnL despite selectivity.

DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes with sell_pressure CVD, normal BB state, bearish MTF alignment, and range_bottom show confirmed positive EV (n>=10, WR 0.74-0.91, aggregate +21 to +28 USD pnl). UP direction, expansion_up BB, buy_pressure CVD, and >=240s TTC remain failing with negative realized pnl despite some positive avg EV. Overall sample of 34 is still small with net -1.5 USD, no material change from prior as this is first detailed view.

With only 34 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals (n=23, WR 0.739) in trending regimes, below VWAP, normal BB, sell-pressure CVD, and bearish supertrend show confirmed positive EV and WR above breakeven after costs; UP signals and most other buckets remain too sparse or negative. Sample size limits confirmation to a handful of high-n buckets (>=8) while the rest are noise. No material change possible without prior analysis.

DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, normal BB state, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV with win-rates well above breakeven on n>=10-31 samples; UP signals and most expansion/squeeze or low-n buckets remain noise. Overall sample of 34 is still tiny and slightly negative pnl masks the selective edges. No material change possible as this is first analysis.

With only 34 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals (n=23, WR 0.739) in trending regimes, normal BB state (n=11, WR 0.909), bearish MTF alignment (n=10, WR 0.9), CVD sell_pressure (n=17, WR 0.824), and 120-240s TTC (n=18, WR 0.722) show positive EV after costs and WR comfortably above breakeven. UP direction and most other buckets remain unprofitable or too small (n<8) to trust. Sample is still tiny so all patterns are provisional.

With 34 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes show confirmed positive EV (n=23/31, WR 0.74/0.65, +21/+8.5 USD) especially when paired with CVD sell_pressure (n=17, WR 0.82), bearish MTF alignment (n=10, WR 0.9), normal BB state (n=11, WR 0.91) and 120-240s TTC (n=18, WR 0.72); UP direction and most other buckets remain unprofitable or too small. Overall pnl slightly negative due to UP trades and a few outliers, but selectivity on DOWN_STRONG already beats breakeven after costs. Sample still modest so patterns require continued observation before any expansion.

With 34 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes show confirmed positive EV (n=23, WR 0.739, +21 USD) especially when combined with bearish MTF alignment (n=10, WR 0.9), CVD sell pressure (n=17, WR 0.823), normal BB state (n=11, WR 0.909), and 120-240s TTC (n=18, WR 0.722). UP direction and expansion BB states remain unprofitable. Overall pnl slightly negative due to small UP sample drag but avg_ev_after_cost positive at 0.148.
changes_since_last: First analysis performed; 34 samples observed with no prior baseline

history.summary: With 34 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes show confirmed positive EV (0.739 WR on n=23, +21 USD) especially under sell_pressure CVD, bearish_aligned MTF, normal BB state, and 120-240s TTC; UP signals and most expansion/squeeze BB states remain unprofitable noise. Sample size still limits calibration outside n>=8 buckets, with overall pnl near breakeven after costs.
changes_since_last: First analysis; no prior shifts observed.

history.summary: With 34 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (n=31), -1..1 z-score (n=20), 120-240s TTC (n=18), below VWAP (n=20), normal BB (n=11), strong ADX trend (n=27), bearish supertrend (n=26), bearish-aligned MTF (n=10), and CVD sell pressure (n=17) show confirmed positive EV with win rates 0.63-0.82 above breakeven after costs. UP signals, >=240s TTC, above VWAP, BB expansion/squeeze, and buy-pressure CVD remain unprofitable or noisy. Sample still small overall; all patterns require continued observation-only validation.

DOWN_STRONG signals (n=24, WR 0.75) in trending regimes, bearish supertrend/HTF bias, sell_pressure CVD, bearish_aligned MTF, normal BB state, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV after costs with n>=8 and positive realized PnL; UP direction and bullish supertrend remain unprofitable. Overall sample (n=35) yields small net positive PnL driven entirely by DOWN bias, with selectivity still weak on mixed/neutral states. No material changes possible as this is first analysis.

With only 35 settled trades (n>=8 threshold applied), DOWN_STRONG, bearish_aligned, sell_pressure, normal BB, range_bottom, and trending regimes show win-rates 0.70-0.91 and positive EV after costs, while UP/bullish signals and expansion_up remain unprofitable. Most other buckets are still too small or mixed to confirm. Overall sample remains too limited for robust conclusions.

DOWN_STRONG signals (n=24, WR 0.75) in trending regimes, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD, and range-bottom states show confirmed positive EV after costs with sufficient samples; UP and weak-signal buckets remain unprofitable. Most other buckets have n<8 and are ignored as noise. Overall sample (35 trades) still small but selectivity edge on DOWN is emerging.

DOWN_STRONG signals (n=24, WR=0.75) in bearish_aligned MTF, sell_pressure CVD, below VWAP, normal BB, and strong_trend ADX regimes show confirmed positive EV after costs with n>=8 and WR well above breakeven; UP signals and most bullish regimes remain unprofitable noise. Overall sample (n=36) still tiny and DOWN-biased, with many buckets ignored due to n<8. No material change possible without prior_analysis.
changes_since_last: No prior_analysis supplied; this is baseline view

history.summary: With only 38 settled trades (n>=8 filter applied), DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, bearish-aligned MTF, sell_pressure CVD, normal BB state, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV and WR above breakeven; UP signals and most expansion/range-top buckets remain negative. Sample is still small and heavily skewed to DOWN, so many buckets are ignored as underpowered or noisy. No prior analysis provided so no delta tracked yet.

With 39 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, bearish supertrend, sell_pressure CVD, bear_close_near_low candles, normal BB state, strong ADX, and bearish MTF alignment show confirmed positive EV (win rates 0.64-0.91, n>=11) while UP signals and most other buckets remain unprofitable or too small. Sample is still modest with heavy rejection rate and no live trading. Patterns in DOWN direction and specific HTF/candle states are separating from noise.
changes_since_last: first analysis; sample now 39 settled trades with DOWN bias emerging
